label: Ritual stage tick action maker (release lanterns)
description: Tick action maker that releases floating lanterns during the ritual stage, consuming wood per launch.

woodCost.label: Wood cost
woodCost.description: Amount of wood consumed per lantern release. Defaults to 4.

preliminaryTicks.label: Preliminary ticks
preliminaryTicks.description: Tick range for the preliminary lantern-gathering phase before release begins.
